GenAiFunction.description:
Probe all MyOrgButler dependencies and return a one-line-per-dependency health report.
Use when: - The user asks "check your health", "are you OK?", "run a self-check", or similar. - A recent action failed and the user wants to know whether an underlying connection is broken. - The user asks which integrations or services are currently working.
NOT for: - Querying org records or metadata — use QueryRecordsWithSoql, ExploreOrgSchema, CallMetadataApi, or CallToolingApi. - Searching the web — use SearchWeb. - Querying Data Cloud data — use QueryDataCloud or SearchDataLibrary.
